title: Comparative evaluation of species delimitation methods and phylogeny of the genus Agrilus (Coleoptera: Buprestidae) from China
author: Zhonghua, Wei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Table S1. Primer information. Table S2. PCR reaction conditions for COI.  Table S3. PCR reaction conditions for CYTB.  Table S4.  Information of  Agrilus  species collected from China. Figure S1. Comparison of results of four methods (ABGD, ASAP, jMOTU, bPTP) based on COI. Figure S2. Comparison of results of four methods (ABGD, ASAP, jMOTU, bPTP) based on CYTB. Figure S3. ML tree based on the concatenated sequences of three genes (COI, CYTB and 28S).  The DNA sequences of COI, CYTB and 28S used in this study are also provided.
steps_raw: Table S1. Primer information. Table S2. PCR reaction conditions for COI.  Table S3. PCR reaction conditions for CYTB.  Table S4.  Information of  Agrilus  species collected from China. Figure S1. Comparison of results of four methods (ABGD, ASAP, jMOTU, bPTP) based on COI. Figure S2. Comparison of results of four methods (ABGD, ASAP, jMOTU, bPTP) based on CYTB. Figure S3. ML tree based on the concatenated sequences of three genes (COI, CYTB and 28S).  The DNA sequences of COI, CYTB and 28S used in this study are also provided.
